data.description: Convert a JSON file, JSON from a file path, or a JSON string to a Data object or a list of Data objects

json_file.info: Upload a JSON file to convert to a Data object or list of Data objects
json_file.name: json_file

json_path.info: Provide the path to the JSON file as pure text
json_path.name: json_path

json_string.info: Enter a valid JSON string (object or array) to convert to a Data object or list of Data objects
json_string.name: json_string

data.description: Create a prompt template with dynamic variables.

tool_placeholder.info: A placeholder input for tool mode.
tool_placeholder.name: tool_placeholder

data.description: Define the agent's instructions, then enter a task to complete using tools.

add_current_date_tool.info: If true, will add a tool to the agent that returns the current date.
add_current_date_tool.name: add_current_date_tool

agent_description.info: The description of the agent. This is only used when in Tool Mode. Defaults to 'A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:' and tools are added dynamically. This feature is deprecated and
agent_description.name: agent_description
agent_description.value: A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:

agent_llm.info: The provider of the language model that the agent will use to generate responses.
agent_llm.name: agent_llm

api_key.info: The OpenAI API Key to use for the OpenAI model.
api_key.name: api_key

format_instructions.info: Generic Template for structured output formatting. Valid only with Structured response.
format_instructions.name: format_instructions

handle_parsing_errors.info: Should the Agent fix errors when reading user input for better processing?
handle_parsing_errors.name: handle_parsing_errors

input_value.info: The input provided by the user for the agent to process.
input_value.name: input_value

max_iterations.info: The maximum number of attempts the agent can make to complete its task before it stops.
max_iterations.name: max_iterations

max_retries.info: The maximum number of retries to make when generating.
max_retries.name: max_retries

max_tokens.info: The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

model_name.info: To see the model names, first choose a provider. Then, enter your API key and click the refresh button next to the model name.
model_name.name: model_name

n_messages.info: Number of chat history messages to retrieve.
n_messages.name: n_messages

openai_api_base.info: The base URL of the OpenAI API. Defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1. You can change this to use other APIs like JinaChat, LocalAI and Prem.
openai_api_base.name: openai_api_base

output_schema.info: Schema Validation: Define the structure and data types for structured output. No validation if no output schema.
output_schema.name: output_schema

seed.info: The seed controls the reproducibility of the job.
seed.name: seed

system_prompt.info: System Prompt: Initial instructions and context provided to guide the agent's behavior.
system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.value: You are a helpful assistant that can use tools to answer questions and perform tasks.

timeout.info: The timeout for requests to OpenAI completion API.
timeout.name: timeout

tools.info: These are the tools that the agent can use to help with tasks.
tools.name: tools

data.description: Uses an LLM to generate structured data. Ideal for extraction and consistency.

input_value.info: The input message to the language model.
input_value.name: input_value

output_schema.info: Define the structure and data types for the model's output.
output_schema.name: output_schema

schema_name.info: Provide a name for the output data schema.
schema_name.name: schema_name

system_prompt.info: The instructions to the language model for formatting the output.
system_prompt.name: system_prompt

data.description: Runs a language model given a specified provider.

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

input_value.info: The input text to send to the model
input_value.name: input_value

max_tokens.info: Maximum number of tokens to generate. Field name varies by provider.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

ollama_base_url.info: Endpoint of the Ollama API (Ollama only). Defaults to http://localhost:11434
ollama_base_url.name: ollama_base_url

project_id.info: The project ID associated with the foundation model (IBM watsonx.ai only)
project_id.name: project_id

system_message.info: A system message that helps set the behavior of the assistant
system_message.name: system_message

data.description: Display a chat message in the Playground.

clean_data.info: Whether to clean data before converting to string.
clean_data.name: clean_data

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

input_data.info: Accepts either a DataFrame or a Data object.
input_data.name: input_data

mode.info: Convert into raw string instead of using a template.
mode.name: mode

pattern.info: Use variables within curly brackets to extract column values for DataFrames or key values for Data.For example: `Name: {Name}, Age: {Age}, Country: {Country}`
pattern.name: pattern
